name: Theme UI
description: Library for creating themeable user interfaces based on constraint-based design principles

description.value: Library for creating themeable user interfaces based on constraint-based design principles

active-maintenance.comment: Regular releases and commits; v0.17.2 released February 2025

initial-release.comment: First release in 2019 as part of the System UI specification

styling-approach.comment: Built on Emotion; uses sx prop for theme-aware styling

component-model.comment: Provides 30+ styled primitive components with theme integration

typescript.comment: 59.6% TypeScript codebase with first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Uses CSS variables with useCustomProperties to prevent flash of unstyled content during SSR/hydration; Gatsby plugin available

rsc-compatible.comment: CSS-in-JS via Emotion not compatible with React Server Components

design-system.comment: Implements System UI specification for constraint-based design tokens

dark-mode.comment: Full color mode support with useColorMode hook; respects prefers-color-scheme and persists to localStorage

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theme object with scales for colors, fonts, fontSizes, fontWeights, lineHeights, space, sizes, borders, radii, shadows, zIndices

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties by default (e.g., --theme-ui-colors-primary); can be disabled for older browsers

design-tokens.comment: Full design token system following System UI specification

component-count.comment: Box, Flex, Grid, Container, Heading, Text, Paragraph, Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Label, Field, Button, IconButton, Link, NavLink, MenuButton, Close, Card, Badge, Alert, Avatar, Progress, Slider, Spinner, Donut, Image, AspectImage, AspectRatio, Embed, Divider, Message

multi-select.comment: Select is basic HTML select wrapper; no multi-select

number-input.comment: Can use Input with type='number' but no dedicated number input with increment/decrement

input-groups.comment: Can compose with Field and Label but no dedicated input group component

table.comment: No table component; relies on MDX styling for tables

tag-chip-pill.comment: Badge is available but no dedicated chip/pill component

dropdown-menu.comment: MenuButton is just a styled button; no dropdown menu functionality

navigation-menu.comment: NavLink component for styled links but no full navigation menu

grid.comment: Grid component for CSS grid layouts

container.comment: Container component for centered max-width layouts

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration; designed for MDX content

code-editors.comment: Prism-react-renderer integration documented for syntax highlighting in MDX

form-libraries.comment: Basic form components; no official form library bindings

animation-libraries.comment: Supports CSS keyframes via Emotion; no documented integration with Framer Motion or other libraries

icon-libraries.comment: IconButton component available but no built-in icon integration

aria-compliant.comment: Primitive components without built-in ARIA patterns; developers must implement accessibility

keyboard-navigation.comment: No keyboard navigation beyond native HTML elements

wcag-level.comment: No accessibility documentation or WCAG compliance claims

accessibility-rating.comment: Relies on native HTML semantics; no accessibility features beyond what browser provides

bundle-size-full.comment: Approximately 33KB minified and gzipped (including Emotion dependency)

bundle-size-core.comment: Core bundle similar size; Emotion is required dependency

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with theming guides, component examples, and MDX integration tutorials

style-override.comment: sx prop for theme-aware styling; CSS variables for theming; supports className and style prop

compound-components.comment: Simple primitive components without compound patterns

unstyled-mode.comment: Components come with minimal but present default styles
